steps.title: Spot the shared purpose
steps.content:
The notes show that Bear Valley NWR was established to protect the endangered bald eagle, and Moapa Valley NWR was established to protect the endangered Moapa dace.

The similarity both refuges share is their purpose: protecting endangered species.

To emphasize this similarity, the answer must highlight this parallel function.

steps.title: Match the similarity to the choices
steps.content: Choice D directly states the shared purpose: both refuges were established to protect endangered species. The other three either mention only one refuge, focus on general context, or highlight differences rather than similarities. That matches choice D — D is correct.
